title: Trump threats against civilian targets put military in legal, moral quandary
summary_full: President Donald Trump said the United States would target “every” Iranian bridge and power plant. Experts say such blanket action violates international law.
summary_public: President Donald Trump said the United States would target “every” Iranian bridge and power plant. Experts say such blanket action violates international law.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Experts say such blanket action violates international law.
